title: Feuilleea myriophylla

It is a climber, with leaves that are heart-shaped and have a pointed tip. The plant produces small, white flowers in clusters, which are followed by red or purple berries. The classification of Feuilleea myriophylla is still being researched, but it is widely accepted to be part of the Celastraceae family.
